headline: Get Paid in
Crypto Without
Sharing Your
Wallet
hero.subheadline: Create confidential payment links on Solana. Receiver identity hidden. Amounts protected. No wallet exposure.

problem.title: The Confidentiality Layer
problem.description: Every transaction you make is permanently public. Your wallet address, counterparties, treasury balance, and payment patterns are all indexed, mapped, calculated, and analyzed. Every dollar. Every relationship. Forever.

features.label: CORE FEATURES
features.title: Confidential Payments, Three Ways
features.subtitle: Stealth addresses. Payment escrow. Gas relayer.

cards.label: FEATURE 01
cards.title: Stealth Addresses
cards.description: A one-time address for every payment. Share your meta-address publicly. Each sender derives a unique stealth address that only you can detect and claim. No one can link payments to your real wallet.

cards.label: FEATURE 02
cards.title: Payment Links
cards.description: Share a link, get paid privately. Create escrow-backed payment links anyone can claim. Funds locked on-chain until recipient claims with a secret.

cards.title: Gas Relayer
cards.description: Recipients don't need SOL to claim payments. Our relayer sponsors the transaction, preventing gas-funding from revealing identity.

steps.title: Create
steps.description: Deposit tokens into an on-chain escrow. A unique payment link is generated with a claim secret.

steps.title: Share
steps.description: Send the link via Telegram, email, or any channel. The recipient doesn't need to share their wallet address.

steps.title: Claim
steps.description: The recipient claims through a stealth address. The gas relayer sponsors the transaction. No identity link between sender and receiver.

telegram.label: TELEGRAM
telegram.title: Confidential Payments via Telegram
telegram.description: Create payment links and check balances directly from Telegram. The bot guides you to the web app for wallet operations.

commands.description:
Open the link below to claim:
pay.zkira.xyz/claim/x7k2...

trust.label: TRUST
trust.title: Confidentiality by Default. Transparency by Choice.

items.title: Self-Custodial
items.description: Your keys, your funds. ZKIRA never holds or controls your tokens. All escrow operations are governed by on-chain smart contracts.

items.title: Open Source
items.description: Every line of code is public on GitHub. The Anchor programs, SDK, and client apps are all verifiable.

items.title: Verifiable
items.description: On-chain escrow with deterministic PDAs. Claim verification uses SHA-256 hash matching. No trusted third party.

cases.title: Freelancers
cases.description: Create payment links for each client. Get paid without exposing your financial position.

cases.title: DAO Contributors
cases.description: Receive grants and bounties through stealth addresses. Your contribution history stays private.

cases.title: Creators & Artists
cases.description: Generate payment links for each sale. Buyers pay, you claim privately.

cases.title: Payroll & Invoicing
cases.description: Pay teams through ZKIRA. Sender and recipient stay unlinked.

developers.label: DEVELOPERS
developers.title: Programmable Privacy
developers.description: Integrate confidential payments into any Solana app with the @zkira/sdk.

items.question: What are stealth addresses?
items.answer: Stealth addresses use ECDH (Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman) cryptography to derive a unique one-time address for every payment. You share a meta-address publicly, and each sender generates a fresh address that only you can detect and claim.

items.question: How do payment links work?
items.answer: When you create a payment link, tokens are deposited into an on-chain escrow program. The link contains a claim secret. Anyone with the link can claim the funds to a stealth address. The escrow ensures funds are locked until claimed or refunded after expiry.

items.question: What are the costs?
items.answer: ZKIRA charges a 0.25% fee on claimed payments. Solana transaction fees are approximately $0.001. The gas relayer sponsors claim transactions, so recipients don't need SOL.

items.question: Which wallets work with ZKIRA?
items.answer: Any Solana wallet that supports the Wallet Adapter standard — Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, and more. For receiving via payment links, no wallet connection is needed until claim time.

items.question: Can ZKIRA see my transactions?
items.answer: No. ZKIRA is fully on-chain and self-custodial. The escrow program is a deterministic Anchor smart contract. We never have access to your funds or transaction details.

items.question: Can I revoke a payment link?
items.answer: Yes. Unclaimed payment links can be refunded by the creator at any time after the expiry period. The funds return to the creator's wallet.

items.question: Is the code audited?
items.answer: ZKIRA is currently on devnet and has not been formally audited. The code is fully open-source on GitHub. We plan to engage professional auditors before mainnet launch.

items.question: Is this different from Tornado Cash?
items.answer: Yes. ZKIRA does not pool funds or mix transactions. Each payment is a direct escrow between sender and a stealth address. There is no shared liquidity pool.

items.question: How do I receive my first payment?
items.answer: Connect your wallet on the ZKIRA web app, and your stealth meta-address is automatically generated. Share a payment link with the sender, and claim when funds arrive.

items.question: Do I need SOL to claim?
items.answer: No. The ZKIRA gas relayer sponsors claim transactions. You can claim payments without holding any SOL.

final_cta.title: Start Receiving Confidential Payments
final_cta.subtitle: Create your first payment link in under sixty seconds. No registration required. Just connect your wallet.
